title: Qur'ān, hadith, classical maxims, and scholarly opinions
subtitle: The source library used in Step 4 of any deliberation. Every entry is presented in its source language, transliteration, and bilingual translation, with translator and provenance named.
noResults: No sources match this search or filter.

seedNotice.title: The library is currently a seed set.
seedNotice.body: The Arabic, transliteration, and translations are a good-faith first pass; we welcome scholarly review via pull request. The review workflow lives in /docs/scholar-review.md (Phase 6). The expanded library now includes the five major qawāʿid fiqhiyya and a representative cross-section of classical and modern scholarly voices.
